Resume

Lect. Dr. Abdelhamıd EL AFAKI EL FELLAH graduated with high distinction in 2004 from the Department of Arabic Language and Literature at Al-Azhar University. He completed his Master’s degree in the same field at the same institution in 2009. He subsequently obtained his PhD from the Department of Arabic Language (Morphology and Syntax), Faculty of Dār al-ʿUlūm, Cairo University.

He previously worked as a teacher of Arabic and Islamic Sciences at a private school in Morocco. In addition, he has participated in numerous professional training programs and has obtained a range of certifications, including the Language Skills Certificate from the Faculty of Dār al-ʿUlūm, Cairo University, a Public Speaking and Preaching Certificate, an ijāzah in Qur’anic memorization, a Qur’an Recitation and Tajwīd Certificate, and the European Computer Driving License (ECDL).

Since 2015, he has been serving as a Lecturer in the Arabic Preparatory Program at the School of Foreign Languages at Istanbul 29 Mayıs University.
